market.title: সোনার বাংলা ইন্স্যুরেন্সের বোর্ড সভা ২৩ জুলাই

world.title: Ecnec approves 8 projects worth Tk14,041cr
world.summary: According to an official statement, of the eight approved projects, three are new and five are revised.

world.title: Dhaka-Ashulia expressway cost jumps to Tk27,046cr, deadline pushed to 2030
world.summary: The mega project began in September 2017 with a completion deadline of June 2022. The first revision extended the deadline until June 2026. Ecnec has now approved another four-year extension based on the actual progress of work and required modifications.

world.title: Gold prices rise again in Bangladesh within 24 hours
world.summary: Under the revised pricing, each bhori (11.664 grams) of 21-carat gold will now cost Tk 2,14,093, while 18-carat gold has been set at Tk 1,83,883 per bhori. Traditional gold will sell at Tk 1,50,232 per bhori, the notice said.

world.title: Chittagong Chamber urges stronger security at Ctg port
world.summary: The leading chamber made the call through a letter to Shipping Minister Shaikh Rabiul Alam

world.title: BKB waives Tk 605 crore farm loans
world.summary: Bangladesh Krishi Bank (BKB) has written off agricultural loans worth more than Tk 604.81 crore for 709,679 small and marginal farmers under the government's loan waiver programme, reducing their debt burden and restoring their access to formal credit.

world.title: Uber agrees $14.8bn deal to acquire Delivery Hero in all-stock transaction
world.summary: Uber has agreed to acquire Berlin-based food delivery company Delivery Hero in an all-stock deal valued at $14.8 billion, a transaction that would nearly double the ride-hailing giant's global footprint and create one of the world's largest delivery platforms outside China.

world.title: Bangladesh Bank eases forex rules for freelancers
world.summary: Inward remittances of up to $20,000 can be credited without formal declaration requirements

world.title: Govt plans to allow private imports of petroleum products: energy minister
world.summary: There are also plans to privatise power distribution to ease the subsidy burden, he said

world.title: UN body refers Bangladesh's 3-year LDC extension request to General Assembly
world.summary: The UN CDP had earlier recommended approving Bangladesh’s request to defer its graduation from the LDC category from November 2026 to November 2029

world.title: Oil extends gains on fresh Mideast supply risks
world.summary: Brent crude futures rose $1, or 1.1 percent, to $92.01 a barrel

world.title: US readies new tariffs as Trump's 10% global levy to expire
world.summary: The Trump administration has prepared fresh tariffs targeting 60 trading partners over their alleged failures to act against forced labor, as officials push to rebuild the US leader's trade agenda after legal setbacks.

world.title: Govt revives talk of sovereign bond
world.summary: Bangladesh is once again considering issuing a sovereign bond to raise funds from international investors, but economists warn the country may not yet be ready

world.title: Bangladesh’s GDP growth halves to 2.2% in Jan-Mar as industry contracts - The Daily Star
world.summary: Bangladesh’s GDP growth halves to 2.2% in Jan-Mar as industry contracts The Daily Star
